decisions.summary: Session-tree slot support belongs in the server session discovery layer, not the React tree, because FeatureItem and SessionNode already render multiple per-issue sessions and route selection by sessionId.
Slot session JSONL lookup must derive the workspace path from the slot number so agent-pan-<issue>-<n> resolves against workspaces/feature-<issue>-slot-<n> instead of the base workspace.

hazards.summary: Frontend issue derivation still needs to normalize slot session ids like agent-pan-969-2 back to PAN-969 anywhere issue context is inferred from the session name.
hazards.mitigation: Finish bead workspace-52u by updating the frontend session-to-issue mapping paths and adding focused tests before final verification.

resumePoint.description: Start bead workspace-52u: update the remaining frontend slot-aware issue/session handling so slot rows select the parent issue context and open the correct terminal/output views, then add focused tests.

beadsMapping.workspace-448: Server-side slot session discovery, issue mapping, and slot workspace JSONL resolution
beadsMapping.workspace-52u: Frontend slot-aware issue/session handling and tests

sessionHistory.note: Completed bead workspace-448 implementation by adding slot-aware session discovery in projects.ts, slot-aware tmux issue extraction in ws-rpc.ts, and focused regression tests.
